case_title: LAU, KENNAN VS MARIPAC AUTOTRANS et al

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-26-2007, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, KENNAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIPAC AUTOTRANS D & G MUSU $1,588.81 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,668.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, KENNAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARIPAC AUTOTRANS D & G MUSU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGEMENT AND ANSWER SENT TO DEFT D & G MUSU, RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGEMENT AND ANSWER SENT TO KENNAN LAU RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT D & G MUSU HEARING SET FOR JUL-26-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTF RETURNED. NOT COPIED TO THE OTHER PARTY.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LAU, KENNAN AS TO DEFENDANT MARIPAC AUTOTRANS D & G MUSU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARIPAC AUTOTRANS
PLAINTIFF FILED SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER. SUBMITTED TO COURT AND ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SC-108A ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT: THE REQUEST IS DENIED. ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
